description: Uses LLM semantic understanding to extract line items from noisy OCR-scanned invoice text. Handles scanning artifacts, typos, and inconsistent formatting. Returns a JSON array of line items with description, quantity, unit_price, and total_price fields.
task_description:
Extract line items from this noisy OCR-scanned invoice document.

IMPORTANT: This OCR text contains scanning artifacts, typos, and inconsistent formatting.
You MUST use LLM-based semantic understanding to extract line items accurately.
Regex/pattern matching will NOT work due to OCR noise.

Extract line items as a JSON array. Each line item should have:
- description: Item/service description
- quantity: Number of units (number or null)
- unit_price: Price per unit (number or null)  
- total_price: Line total (number or null)

Return empty array [] if no line items can be confidently extracted.

OCR Text:
WINIFRED E. MEAHL
236 East 36th Street
New York, New York 10016
212-532-8892
February 18, 2000
$-3-43 1299
Scott Benson
Lorillard, Inc.
714 Green Valley Road
Greensboro, NC 27408
ok J6H
#3514
FOR PROFESSIONAL SERVICES RENDERED:
VALIDATION:

A&G#1I7-2-99-LTCH#5543-799
Newport Medium Concept Test (N=502)..
$275.00
8

JSON:

**IMPORTANT: The task provides these input variables:**
- `prompt` (string) - **THE RAW INPUT DATA** that varies per instance. Your activity MUST parse and process this!

**CRITICAL:** Your workflow MUST use `prompt` as the input variable. The prompt contains the raw data to process.
Available variables: prompt

**OUTPUT FORMAT (STRUCTURE DESCRIPTION - NO HARDCODED VALUES!):**
Your activity must return data matching this structure:
```json
json
```

**CRITICAL RULES:**
- The format above describes FIELD NAMES and TYPES only
- Extract ACTUAL values from the `prompt` variable at runtime
- Do NOT hardcode any values from examples
- Do NOT add extra fields
- Match field names EXACTLY as specified

inputs.name: ocr_text
inputs.description: The raw OCR-scanned invoice text that may contain scanning artifacts, typos, and inconsistent formatting. Contains invoice headers, line items with descriptions and prices, and other invoice metadata.

output.description: Returns a JSON array of line item objects extracted from the OCR text. Each line item has: description (str) - the item/service description, quantity (number or null) - number of units if identifiable, unit_price (number or null) - price per unit if identifiable, total_price (number or null) - line total if identifiable. Returns empty array [] if no line items can be confidently extracted. Example: [{"description": "Newport Medium Concept Test (N=502)", "quantity": null, "unit_price": null, "total_price": 275.00}]

workflow_spec.name: Extract Invoice Line Items from OCR Text
workflow_spec.description: Extracts structured line items from noisy OCR-scanned invoice documents using LLM-based semantic understanding. Handles scanning artifacts, typos, and inconsistent formatting to identify item descriptions, quantities, unit prices, and total prices.
